sentences.target: On visite une forteresse près de la mer.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ vi.zit yn fɔʁ.tə.ʁɛs pʁɛ də la mɛʁ/

translations.fr: On visite une forteresse près de la mer.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ vi.zit yn fɔʁ.tə.ʁɛs pʁɛ də la mɛʁ/
translations.en: We’re visiting a fortress near the sea.
translations.es: Estamos visitando una fortaleza cerca del mar.
translations.de: Wir besichtigen eine Festung in der Nähe des Meeres.
translations.it: Stiamo visitando una fortezza vicino al mare.
translations.ko: 우리는 바다 근처의 요새를 방문하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在参观海边的一座堡垒。
translations.yue: 我哋喺海邊附近參觀一座堡壘。
translations.pt: Estamos visitando uma fortaleza perto do mar.
translations.tr: Deniz yakınında bir kaleyi ziyaret ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tham quan một pháo đài gần biển.
translations.nl: We bezoeken een vesting dicht bij de zee.
translations.hu: Egy erődöt látogatunk a tenger közelében.
translations.hi: हम समुद्र के पास एक किले का दौरा कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Επισκεπτόμαστε ένα φρούριο κοντά στη θάλασσα.
translations.nb: Vi besøker en festning nær havet.
translations.id: Kami sedang mengunjungi sebuah benteng dekat laut.
translations.sv: Vi besöker en fästning nära havet.
translations.ro: Vizităm o fortăreață aproape de mare.
translations.da: Vi besøger en fæстning nær havet.
translations.ja: 海の近くの要塞を見学しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun meaning ‘we/one’; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun as a non-specific referent.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘visite’.
Adverb forming part of the complex preposition ‘près de’ that introduces a locative complement.
Preposition completing ‘près de’; links the complement noun phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines ‘mer’.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘de’, forming a location phrase.

sentences.target: J'ai rêvé d'une forteresse en montagne.

translations.fr: J'ai rêvé d'une forteresse en montagne.
translations.en: I dreamed of a fortress in the mountains.
translations.es: Soñé con una fortaleza en las montañas.
translations.de: Ich habe von einer Festung in den Bergen geträumt.
translations.it: Ho sognato una fortezza in montagna.
translations.zh-Hans: 我梦见了山中的一座堡垒。
translations.yue: 我夢見咗山裡嘅一座堡壘。
translations.pt: Sonhei com uma fortaleza nas montanhas.
translations.vi: Tôi mơ thấy một pháo đài trên núi.
translations.nl: Ik droomde van een vesting in de bergen.
translations.hi: मैंने पहाड़ों में एक किले का सपना देखा.
translations.pl: Śniła mi się twierdza w górach.
translations.nb: Jeg drømте om en festning i fjellene.
translations.id: Saya bermimpi tentang sebuah benteng di pegunungan.
translations.sv: Jag drömde om en fästning i bergen.
translations.ro: Am visat o fortăreață în munți.
translations.cs: Snil jsem o pevnosti v horách.
translations.da: Jeg drømte om en fæstning i bjergene.
translations.ja: 山の中の要塞を夢に見ました。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘je’, elided before a vowel; 1st person singular subject.
Auxiliary ‘avoir’, present indicative 1st person singular; forms the passé composé with the past participle.
Past participle; main lexical verb in compound past (passé composé).
Preposition ‘de’, elided before vowel; selected by ‘rêver de’ to introduce its complement.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the complement noun.
Common noun, feminine; complement of the preposition ‘de’ after ‘rêver de’.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase (‘en montagne’).
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘en’, indicating location.

sentences.target: Tu dessines une forteresse en sable, là.
sentences.reading: /ty de.sin yn fɔʁ.tə.ʁɛs ɑ̃ sabl la/

translations.fr: Tu dessines une forteresse en sable, là.
translations.ipa: /ty de.sin yn fɔʁ.tə.ʁɛs ɑ̃ sabl la/
translations.en: You’re drawing a sand fortress there.
translations.es: Estás dibujando una fortaleza de arena allí.
translations.it: Stai disegnando lì una fortezza di sabbia.
translations.ko: 너 거기서 모래 요새를 그리고 있어.
translations.yue: 你喺嗰度畫緊一個沙堡。
translations.pt: Você está desenhando uma fortaleza de areia ali.
translations.vi: Con đang vẽ một pháo đài bằng cát ở đó.
translations.ar: أنت ترسم قلعة من الرمل هناك.
translations.hi: तुम वहाँ रेत में एक किले का चित्र बना रहे हो.
translations.el: Ζωγραφίζεις εκεί ένα φρούριο από άμμο.
translations.id: Kamu sedang menggambar sebuah benteng pasir di sana.
translations.ro: Desenezi acolo o fortăreață din nisip.
translations.ja: あなたはそこで砂の要塞を描いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; transitive.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the direct object.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘dessines’.
Preposition marking material/composition (‘en sable’ = made of sand).
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘en’, expressing material.
Deictic adverb; here used as a sentence-final locative/emphatic marker.

sentences.target: Notre ville a une forteresse au centre.
sentences.reading: /nɔtʁ vil a yn fɔʁ.tə.ʁɛs o sɑ̃tʁ/

translations.fr: Notre ville a une forteresse au centre.
translations.ipa: /nɔtʁ vil a yn fɔʁ.tə.ʁɛs o sɑ̃tʁ/
translations.en: Our city has a fortress in the center.
translations.es: Nuestra ciudad tiene una fortaleza en el centro.
translations.de: Unsere Stadt hat im Zentrum eine Festung.
translations.it: La nostra città ha una fortezza al centro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们城市中心有一座堡垒。
translations.yue: 我哋城市中心有一座堡壘。
translations.ru: В нашем городе в центре есть крепость.
translations.pt: Nossa cidade tem uma fortaleza no centro.
translations.vi: Thành phố của chúng tôi có một pháo đài ở trung tâm.
translations.nl: Onze stad heeft een vesting in het centrum.
translations.uk: У нашому місті в центрі є фортеця.
translations.hi: हमारे शहर के केंद्र में एक किला है.
translations.pl: W naszym mieście w centrum jest twierdza.
translations.el: Η πόλη μας έχει ένα φρούριο στο κέντρο.
translations.nb: Byen vår har en festning i sentrum.
translations.id: Kota kami memiliki sebuah benteng di pusat kota.
translations.sv: Vår stad har en fästning i centrum.
translations.ro: Orașul nostru are o fortăreață în centru.
translations.cs: V našem městě je v centru pevnost.
translations.da: Vores by har en fæстning i centrum.
translations.ja: 私たちの街の中心に要塞があります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; modifies ‘ville’.
Common noun, feminine; syntactic subject of ‘a’.
Main verb ‘avoir’, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the object noun.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘a’.
Preposition (contraction of ‘à + le’); introduces the locative complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘au’, forming a location phrase.
